name: G-Plates LC Light Curing Baseplates
description: Light-curing Baseplates for making individual customised impression trays and functional trays. Can be used chairside to make accurate bases for bite registration and wax try-ins. Each box contains 50 plates. High dimensional stability with very low shrinkage Soft consistency, excellent malleability and adaptation to model. Long shelf life and storability.

name: G-Wax Dental Modelling Wax
description: G-Wax Dental Modelling Wax has high temperature stability and offers a more accurate try and less risk of distortion in the mouth.  Sheets of Modelling Wax are used by the technician to create the preliminary denture base that the dentist will try on in the patient's mouth.

name: G-Clean Tray Cleaner
description: A fast and effective solution for impression trays, instruments, and accessories. G-Clean gently dissolves alginate and plaster residues without scratching or sanding. Simply soak for 15-30 minutes, rinse with running water, and your trays will be spotless and ready to use. Discover easy cleaning with G-Clean!

name: G-Dent Liner
description: G-Dent Liner is a light-curing, compomer liner composed of polyacid-modified composite resins and glass ionomer fillers. Its formulation allows for slight expansion, partially compensating for the polymerization shrinkage of composite materials. The glass ionomer content enhances adhesion to dentin, doubling its bonding strength.

name: G-Dent Temp Fill
description: Self-Curing, Eugenol Free Temporary Filling Material Temp Fill is a self-curing, eugenol-free, bioinert temporary filling made from zinc oxide and synthetic resins.  It hardens upon contact with oral moisture and provides reliable sealing with easy application. Excellent retention and easy handling Medium hardness after setting, ensuring easy removal Ready to use, no mixing required

name: SKU - A1
description: G-Dent Nano Hybrid Composite is a light-curing, bioinert and radiopaque nano-hybrid composite available in Vita shades.  It offers high aesthetics, excellent polishability, color stability, superior strength and abration resistance, ensuring durable and natural-looking restorations. Indirect restorations such as inlays and onlays Core build-ups Non-sticky formulation for easy handling High resistance and durability Excellent biocompatibility High radiopacity Fast and easy polishing to a lasting, high-gloss finish Long-lasting aesthetic results with shade stability Compatible with all conventional bonding agents

name: G-ZNO Zinc Oxide
description: G-ZNO Zinc Oxide Eugenol Cement is recommended to be used as a temporary filling material and as a primer filler under a permanent cement material. Primer filling under permanent cement material Heat insulator for flake protection in deep cavities Forms a firm consistency for easy application Strong enough to withstand masticatory forces for a limited time Easily removable before applying the final filling material Biologically compatible with pH 7 - 8

name: G-Dent Dual CEM
description: G-Dent Dual CEM is a dual-curing, bioinert and radiopaque cement formulated with metacrylate resins and silica/barium glass filler particles. It provides high strength, superior resistance and optimal bonding characteristics. The use of automix tips ensures a homogenous mixture for precise and direct applications.

name: G-Dent Retraction Cord - Size #000
description:
G-Dent Retraction Cord is a non-sterile, 100% cotton cord, knitted into thousands of tiny loops to form long interlocking chains.
Its unique design ensures rapid tissue displacement while preventing entanglement in diamond burs.
Available in four sizes (#1, #0, #00, #000), each marked according to its thickness.

Size #000: For lower anteriors; subgingival veneer luting; Class III, IV and V restorations

description:

name: G-Dent Gingiva Barrier
description: G-Dent Gingival Barrier is a light-cured, resin-based gingival barrier. It is used to protect soft tissues during whitening treatments and other procedures, as well as for Rubber Dam applications.  With its turquoise color, it is easy to apply and user-friendly.

name: G-Dent Prophylaxis Powder
description: Enhance the power of your treatments with a specially formulated powder designed for gentle and effective cleaning. It ensures through cleaning with soft impacts while minimizing the risk of damage to tooth surfaces and tissues, providing safe usage. Its unique particle structure helps prevent clogging in devices.

name: G-Dent Prophy Paste
description: G-Dent Prophy Paste is an oil-free paste formulated for effective tooth cleaning and polishing.  It is designed to efficiently remove plaque, debris, stains and calculus while preparing the tooth surface for restorative procedures and fluoride treatments.

name: GSMedex SD-Speedx
description: Speedx films ensure that images are readily avilable daylight allowing professionals to streamline processes. The monobath single-step solution for rapid developing and fixing is our excellence with outstanding performances. Speedx is a great solution for intraoral imaging needs.
